---
title: "Şeytantepe"
date: 2025-04-11
author: "140journos"
image: cover.jpg
description: "On a hot August evening, a small girl's disappearance falling into gendarmerie radios captures the entire public agenda. Angry crowds launch a witch hunt in a village they have never set foot in."
categories: [Documentary]
featured: true
toc: false
listing:
  - id: siblings
    contents:
      - "../*/index.qmd"
    type: table
    sort: "date desc"
    fields: [title, date]
    table-striped: false
    table-hover: false
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
    feed: false
---

::: {.column-margin}
**Other videos in this category**

::: {#siblings}
:::
:::

{{< video2 https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=iMn0bEshf6w >}}

## Description

On a hot August evening, a small girl's disappearance falling into gendarmerie radios captures the entire public agenda. Angry crowds, whipped up by the thousand-and-one fantasies they hear on daytime true-crime shows, launch a witch hunt in a village they have never visited, never seen, never known. The entire village is crucified — guilty and innocent alike. Meanwhile, the ghost in the village watches it all unfold with cool composure.

**Channel:** [140journos](https://www.youtube.com/@140journos)
**Release date:** 11 April 2025
